notes.typed: Typed rankings are calculated using super-effective damage for the chosen type, and neutral damage for all other types.
notes.versus: "Versus" rankings are calculated using appropriate effectiveness multiplier for attacking damage.

affinity.prefix: Rankings are calculated based on an

dex.unreleased: §This species/form is not in the **Pokémon GO** files yet

stats.title: Stats, IVs, and CP
stats.base-tooltip:
§Pokémon stats as found in the Game Master
for this species/form
stats.max-tooltip:
§Real in-game stats for a
Perfect-IV Level 50 Pokémon

level-tooltip.cpm: Determines the Multiplier (CPM) used when calculating effective stats
level-tooltip.levelup: Can be raised by one half-level per "Power-up"
level-tooltip.max: Maximum level is 50 (+1 if Best Buddy)
level-tooltip.hidden: Never displayed directly in game; represented by a white arc in the Pokémon screen

iv-tooltip.title: "Individual Values"
iv-tooltip.explanation: Additional points in each stat, as displayed in the Appraisal screen

stats.hundo-tooltip:
Real in-game stats for a Perfect-IV Pokémon
at the specified Level
stats.effective-tooltip: Real in-game stats for a Pokémon with the specified Level and IVs

notes.method: Calculations take into account the counter's damage against this Pokémon and the counter's resistance to incoming damage from this Pokémon.
notes.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Calculations cannot capture some of the nuances of real raid battles. These calculations are best used to gauge overall attacker strength, not performance against any single raid boss. For the most accurate list of raid counters, please reference simulations instead.

species.title: Species Filters
species.unreleased-tooltip: Include Pokémon found in the Game Master but not yet available in game
species.legendary-tooltip: Also includes Mythical Pokémon and Ultrabeasts

moves.title: Move Filters
moves.elite-tooltip:
§Allow moves with limited availability
(Requires Special event or Elite TMs)
moves.mixed-tooltip: Allow fast and charged moves to be different types
moves.off-tooltip: Allow movesets where neither the fast nor charged move matches the target type

display.title: Display Settings
display.group-enabled: Compare suboptimal movesets to that Pokémon's best moveset
display.group-disabled: Compare all movesets to each other
display.best-tooltip: Compare to the absolute best Pokémon
display.tiers-tooltip:
§Determines how tiers are computed.
Depends on comparison Pokémon.
display.jenks-tooltip: Algorithmic tiers based on minimum variance
display.espace-tiers: Tiers with hardcoded breakpoints at every 10%

absolute-tooltip.title: Absolute tiers based on only the displayed rating
absolute-tooltip.purpose: Best for comparing across different types

tdo-tooltip.title: Total Damage Output
tdo-tooltip.explanation: Amount of damage done before fainting

edps-tooltip.title: Effective DPS
edps-tooltip.explanation: In an infinite-length raid, this is the actual DPS that would be achieved when accounting for the time lost relobbying.

budget50-tooltip.title: Budget50
budget50-tooltip.lv40: Use stats at Level 40 for Legendaries
budget50-tooltip.lv50: Use stats at Level 50 for non-Legendaries
budget50-tooltip.characteristic: Helps adjust for the scarcity of rare XL candies

pp-tooltip.title: Party Power
pp-tooltip.explanation: Size of Party for party power boosts
pp-tooltip.characteristic: Boosts charged damage based on the ratio of fast:charged moves

afinity-tooltip.title: Type Affinity
afinity-tooltip.explanation: Use real high-tier raid bosses when calculating rankings
afinity-tooltip.characteristic: Takes into account the actual types, attack types, attack strengths, and stats of raid bosses based on the current scenario.

team-tooltip.title: Raid Team Size
team-tooltip.explanation: Size of battle team for computing eDPS
team-tooltip.characteristic: Computes eDPS as if N identical copies of the Pokémon were in a battle team, and relobbying only occurred after each Nth death

megasolo-tooltip.title: MegaSolo
megasolo-tooltip.explanation: Use a 6-mon team for everything but Megas, which fight solo

relobby-tooltip.title: Relobby Time
relobby-tooltip.explanation: Time spent max reviving a full raid team and rejoining the battle

moves.pps-tooltip: How effective a move is at dealing damage
moves.eps-tooltip: How effective a fast move is at building up charged move energy
moves.ppe-tooltip: How efficiently a charged move converts energy into damage
moves.p2pes-tooltip: §How well a charged move both uses charged energy *and* deals damage
moves.peps2-tooltip: §How well a fast move accomplishes both building charged energy *and* dealing damage on its own
